id: get-terms-of-use

sidebar_label: "Get Terms Of Use"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Terms Of Use"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/application/termsOfUse"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Provides the Terms Of Use for the given Applications in the given locales.
If no applicationId is given Terms Of Use for all applications will be provided.
If there are no Terms Of Use for given applicationId the application will be ignored.
If no locale is given Terms Of Use for all available languages will be provided.
If there are no Terms Of Use for given locale the response will fallback to the english URL but keep the requested locale.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
